channel.title: BugJournals on TzJ's Net
channel.description: Recent content in BugJournals on TzJ's Net

item.title: Bug Journal 2025-01-01
item.description:
Part Hugo

How to create a Hugo website

This is a good tutorial.

However, the themes may contain bugs. (The best way is to download another theme!)

  1. Language Code Error:
    • Some theme use site.LanguageCode and others use site.Lang.LanguageCode
  2. Code Highlight Error:
    • Change it to .post-content pre code { word-break: normal !important; white-space: pre !important; }
